Registration.conferenceDatesRow: 12 November 2026, 9:00 am – 5:00 pm (HK Time) & 13 November 2026, 9:00 am – 1:00 pm (HK Time)
Registration.conferenceVenueRow: 2F Grand Ballroom, Kerry Hotel Hong Kong
Registration.attendanceQuestion: Will you attend the forum in person or online?
Registration.grandBallroom: 2F Grand Ballroom, Kerry Hotel Hong Kong
Registration.socialEventsIntroFigma: Please only select the social events that you will actually attend as late cancellations or no-shows on the day may result in unnecessary charges for the host. Please update your registration or contact the organising team if any changes to the registration are required.
Registration.socialEventsReceptionExtraRich: Further details regarding the reception, including the dress code (Black Tie), will be available on the <iais>IAIS website</iais>.
Registration.socialEventMembersDinner: 12 November: Dinner for IAIS Members only
Registration.socialEventConferenceReception: 13 November: Reception for Annual Conference participants
Registration.visaLetterLabel: I require an Hong Kong visa letter
Registration.visaLetterHelpRich: For all information regarding the visa letter <link>please visit this link</link>. All relevant details required for the issuance of the visa letter will be formally requested in the confirmation email that you will receive.
Registration.travelInformationIntro: Travel information will be used in an anonymised way to assist in measuring the IAIS' carbon footprint in furtherance of the IAIS environmental policy.
Registration.travelCarbonQuestion: Did you or your organisation participate in a carbon offsetting programme for your travel to the event?
Registration.consentPdpoRich: I consent to the collection, processing, and storing of my personal data as outlined in the <notice>IAIS Privacy Notice</notice> and in compliance with Hong Kong Law No. XXX on Personal Data Protection<req>*</req>
Registration.formFooterPrivacyBodyRich: Your name and organisation details will be included in the participants list; and photos and recordings will take place of the Annual Conference. In order to submit your registration for the IAIS Annual Conference you need to consent to us collecting and using your personal information as laid out in the <notice>IAIS Privacy Notice</notice>.
Registration.lunchSelect: Please select the lunch you will attend.
Registration.dietaryQuestion: Do you have any dietary preference?
Registration.title: Title
Registration.searchCountry: Type to search countries or regions…
Registration.sameAsDelegate: Primary contact is the same as delegate
Registration.cpdIntro: IAIS 2026 is a Type 7 Qualified CPD Activity specified under the CPD Guideline (GL24) issued by the Insurance Authority.
Registration.cpdEarnPrefix: Individual licensees are eligible to earn
Registration.cpdWarningBold: Any application for CPD hours submitted thereafter may not be considered.
Registration.cpdQuestionMain: I would like to apply for the CPD hours
Registration.cpdNote1: Note 1: Participants who wish to earn 5.5 CPD hours by attending IAIS 2026 are required to attend the entire event from 9:30 am to 5:05 pm (excluding the lunch session). They must sign in upon arrival and sign out at the end of the event at the CPD hour registration counter by scanning a QR code to confirm their attendance.
Registration.ack1: Registration is subject to final confirmation by the Insurance Authority (IA). The IA reserves the right at any time, whether before or during the event, in the IA's sole and absolute discretion and without giving any reason, to revoke any registration for the Annual General Meeting (IAIS) by giving notice to the registered participant(s). Information is subject to change without prior notice.
Registration.ack2: The information collected during the registration process is only for registration and administrative purposes for IAIS 2026 and for event communication with attendees. The information will be handled solely by IA staff, authorized persons and authorized contractors of IAIS 2026.
Registration.consentLabel: I acknowledge that I have read and agree with the above statements.
Registration.privacyPara1Rich: We handle your personal data with care in accordance with our <policy>Privacy Policy</policy>. You have the right to request access to and correct your personal data. If you wish to exercise your right, please contact our Data Privacy Officer by post at the Insurance Authority, 19/F, 41 Heung Yip Road, Wong Chuk Hang, Hong Kong.

Pay.noPaymentBody: You indicated you will not attend. You can still complete registration.
Pay.howPay: How would you like to pay?
Pay.payOnlineBody: Pay instantly using your debit card, credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Alipay, or WeChat Pay (where enabled in Stripe).
Pay.payWalletBody: Pay instantly using your credit card (Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, Google Pay) or Alipay / WeChat Pay via our PaymentAsia checkout.
Pay.payWalletHint: PaymentAsia opens a secure page first; tap Pay Now, then continue in your selected payment method. Use Safari or Chrome where possible; in-app browsers (e.g. inside WeChat) may block wallets.
Pay.walletNeedDraft: Save your registration and return to this step to pay with PaymentAsia.
Pay.stripeOnlineNeedDraft: Continue through Review first so your registration is saved, then return here to pay with Stripe (Alipay / WeChat Pay need a saved draft).
Pay.stripeAlipayWechatHint: Alipay via Stripe opens a secure page; WeChat Pay may show a QR code. Enable both in Stripe Dashboard → Payment methods.
Pay.walletStartFailed: Could not start wallet payment. Check PaymentAsia configuration or try again.
Pay.walletNoProvider: Wallet payment is not configured. Set PAYMENTASIA_MERCHANT_TOKEN and PAYMENTASIA_SECRET_CODE on the server.
Pay.payBankBody: Transfer the payment using the bank details provided and upload your payment receipt for verification.
Pay.payNotConfirmedUntilPaid: Your registration is not confirmed until payment is completed.
Pay.bankIntroLine1: We will verify your payment and confirm your registration once received.
Pay.bankIntroLine2: Please keep your payment receipt for verification.
Pay.bankDetailsCardTitle: Details you'll need to make this transfer
Pay.bankAddress: Citi Tower, 83 Hoi Bun Road, One Bay East, Kwun Tong, Hong Kong
Pay.bankReferenceCalloutBody:
Please include this payment reference when making your bank transfer.
This helps us identify your payment and verify your registration more quickly.
Pay.bankReferenceNote: Please use this reference when making your bank transfer. Keep a copy of your payment slip for upload.
Pay.bankPendingNote: Your registration will be confirmed once we verify your payment.
Pay.payWithStripe: Pay securely with Stripe (cards and wallets where available).
Pay.stripeCheckoutFailed: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
Pay.checkoutDraftExpired: Your payment session is out of date. Go back, tap Continue to Review again, then Proceed to payment.
Pay.saveFailed: Could not save your registration. Please try again.
Pay.walletUnavailableHint: Apple Pay and Google Pay only appear when your browser reports them (e.g. Safari on iPhone/Mac for Apple Pay; Chrome on Android for Google Pay). On desktop Chrome they often stay unavailable — use Card or another method.
Pay.applePaySafariHint: Apple Pay on the web is only offered in Safari (iPhone, iPad, Mac). Chrome and other browsers use Google Pay here instead. Also register your site domain under Stripe → Settings → Payment method domains so Apple Pay can activate in Safari.
Pay.slipUploadDragHint: Drag your file(s) to start uploading
Pay.slipErrorNoFile: Please upload your payment receipt first.
Pay.paymentRequiredDescription: Your registration is confirmed, but payment is still pending. Please complete your payment to finalize your registration.

Pay.payByStripeBody: Pay now with Visa or Mastercard, Alipay (CN & HK), Wechat Pay (CN & HK), Apple Pay & Google Pay

Footer.eventTitle: IAIS AGM, Annual Conference and Committee Meeting 2026

PoliciesPage.privacyP1: We collect personal information you provide during registration, including your name, company, contact details, attendance preferences, payment information, and any supporting documents you submit.
PoliciesPage.privacyP2: Your information is used only for event registration, payment verification, event administration, attendee communication, and related operational purposes.
PoliciesPage.privacyP3: Your data will only be accessed by authorised staff and service providers supporting this event. We do not store full payment card details on this website.
PoliciesPage.privacyP4: By using this website and submitting your registration, you agree to the collection and use of your information in accordance with this policy.
PoliciesPage.refundP1: Registration is subject to final confirmation by the organiser. Submission of the registration form or payment does not automatically guarantee confirmed participation.
PoliciesPage.refundP2: Unless otherwise stated, registration fees are generally non-refundable once payment has been successfully received and processed.
PoliciesPage.refundP3: If you believe a duplicate or incorrect payment has been made, please contact us as soon as possible with your payment details and proof of payment. Any refund request will be reviewed by the organiser.
PoliciesPage.cookiesP1: We use cookies to ensure the website functions properly, remember your preferences, and improve your browsing experience.
PoliciesPage.cookiesP2: Some cookies are necessary for the website to work, while optional cookies may be used for analytics, personalisation, and related website improvement purposes.
PoliciesPage.cookiesP3: You can manage your cookie preferences through the Cookies Settings panel on this website.

faqItems.q: How do I register for the event?
faqItems.a: To register, complete the registration form on the website, review your details, and proceed to payment. Your registration will only be completed after payment has been successfully received and verified.
Depending on the registration flow, payment may be made online using supported payment methods, or by bank transfer using the bank details provided on the payment page.
Yes. If you do not wish to pay immediately, a payment link will be sent to your registered email address. You may use that link later to return and complete payment.

faqItems.q: How do I pay by bank transfer?
faqItems.a: Use the bank account details shown on the payment step, include your registration reference in the transfer, and upload the payment receipt if the flow requires it.

faqItems.q: How do I know if my registration is complete?
faqItems.a: You will receive a confirmation by email once your payment has been verified and your registration is confirmed by the organiser.

faqItems.q: Can I update my registration details after submission?
faqItems.a: Contact the organiser with your reference number if you need changes. Whether changes are allowed depends on event policy and timing.
Online card payments are processed by a certified payment provider. Card details are not stored on this website.

faqItems.q: Will I receive an invoice or receipt?
faqItems.a: A receipt or confirmation is sent according to the payment method and organiser process. Check your email after successful payment.

CookieBanner.body: We use cookies to make sure that our website works properly and to offer you the best experience possible. By continuing to use our site, you consent to the use of cookies. If you wish to learn more about our use of Cookies and / or change your Cookie preferences, please visit our <settings>Cookies Settings</settings>.

CookiesPage.title: Cookies Settings
CookiesPage.introBefore: We use cookies to ensure the website functions properly, improve your browsing experience, and understand how our website is used. You can manage your cookie preferences below. For more details, please see our
CookiesPage.essentialBody: These cookies are essential for the website to function properly and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in, or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site may not work properly. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
CookiesPage.experienceBody: These cookies allow the website to remember choices you make and provide enhanced, more personalised features. They may be set by us or by third-party service providers whose tools we have added to our website. If you do not allow these cookies, some services may not function properly.
CookiesPage.adsBody: These cookies may be used to deliver more relevant advertisements and measure the effectiveness of marketing campaigns. They may be set by us or by our advertising partners to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant content on other websites. They do not directly store personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and device.
CookiesPage.analyticsBody: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. They help us improve website performance, optimise content, and identify areas that may need attention.
CookiesPage.savedHint: Your preferences have been saved on this device.
